p.strong: Per-package go.mod coordinated by go.work · selective imports · enforced boundaries

ul.li: Selective imports — go get .../icons no longer pulls display/forms/tailwind-merge-go
Enforced boundaries — internal/svg becomes a real module (leakage = compile error)
Independent versioning — icons/utils can tag v1.x while display is still v0.x
Smaller CI surface — only changed modules rebuild
10 go.mod files to keep in lockstep (automate via tooling)
Slightly more consumer friction for cross-package imports
Post-v1.0 API freeze — not before the public API stabilizes
